currentFocus: Docs/state now reflect the accepted docs-only primitive projection contract, test-only launch-preset guard hardening, no-delete storage taxonomy, and private pre-arm-only runtime baton.

currentDocsTruth.projectionContract: The primitive projection note is a public-safe design contract for future PatchBench receipt/source-summary presentation helpers. It is not behavior movement, helper extraction approval, AppCore ownership movement, runtime proof, release readiness, or online-readiness evidence.
currentDocsTruth.roadmapIndex: ROADMAP-INDEX routes readers to the existing primitive projection contract and refreshes metadata for the integrated design-only row.
currentDocsTruth.launchPresetHardening: WinUiProductLaneTests launch-preset changes are static presentation-boundary guards only. They protect helper routing and literal placement; they do not prove native UIA behavior or runtime launch behavior.
currentDocsTruth.storageSummary: Storage taxonomy is summarized only as read-only/no-delete: high-confidence deletion candidates 0, deletion performed false, authorized reclaimed storage 0 GiB. Future medium/low values are non-authorized logical review ceilings only and should not be presented as reclaimable storage.
currentDocsTruth.runtimeProofBaton: Runtime music proof remains private pre-arm readiness only with readyToRunLiveAttempt=false, liveArmAllowed=false, runtimeAudibleOutputProof=false, and preArmReadiness.status=prearm-readiness-not-proven.
currentDocsTruth.consultEvidence: The early consult-evidence smoke is stale because it ran before terminal reports existed. Integration supersedes it with an audit of accepted terminal worker/reviewer reports and the required six-lane consult matrix, without copying local reports into tracked docs/state.
currentDocsTruth.rejectedEvidence: Superseded recovery outputs are not canonical. Do not copy their local reports into tracked docs/state.
currentDocsTruth.localOnlyBoundary: Tracked docs/state must not include local campaign paths, worktree paths, thread IDs, raw reports, raw manifests, raw proof paths, raw Ghidra paths, hard payload names beyond policy categories, secrets, or private evidence dumps.
currentDocsTruth.claimBoundary: No AppCore behavior, launch argument behavior, selected-state logic, safe-copy planning, process control, patch catalog row, byte patch, Host/Join availability, online readiness, runtime proof, release/publication, gameplay, visual parity, rebuild parity, no-noticeable-difference parity, Ghidra mutation, hard-payload, installed-game, or original-BEA mutation claim changed.

validation.expectation: Use docs/repo/payload gates plus WinUI/focused tests required by the accepted test-only change.
validation.latestIntegration: Docs/repo/payload gates, WinUI build, focused launch-preset UiTests, and patch-engine safety passed. npm run test:winui-primary-lane is not green because one native UIA smoke failed with FlaUI Mouse.SendInput Access denied after build and AppCore success; do not describe the primary lane as passing.

currentCounters.catalogRows: 29/29 target specimen identity and policy metadata rows

nextSteps: For docs, keep the next baton executable: primitive-state/helper-boundary tests that reject AppCore DTOs, raw paths, File/Directory/Path, service/process/launch/catalog tokens, proof IDs, and Host/Join action strings before receipt helper extraction.
For storage, document only retained/no-delete status until a future manifest-backed authority changes it.
For runtime proof, keep public docs at private pre-arm-only/no-live-execution unless accepted proof evidence changes.
